user_query: I'm a financial advisor and I want to provide my clients with up-to-date information on the cryptocurrency market. Can you provide me with the most recent articles on cryptocurrency from the Crypto News API? I also need the financial analysis and historic data for Tesla stock using Yahoo Finance's APIs.

TaskList.description: Fetch the most recent articles on cryptocurrency from the Crypto News API.
Retrieve financial analysis and historic data for Tesla stock using Yahoo Finance's APIs.
